allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Administrator\\Desktop\\NetFlowProject - Copy" -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.py','.csv' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object FullName, LastWriteTime -First 30)

PowerShell($df = Get-Item "data/NF-CSE-CIC-IDS2018-v3.csv" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($df\) { $sizeGB = $df.Length / 1GB; Write-Host "  [OK] data/NF-CSE-CIC-IDS2018-v3.csv \($\([math]::Round\($sizeGB, 1\)\) GB\)" } else { Write-Host "  [MISSING] data/NF-CSE-CIC-IDS2018-v3.csv" })
